prestazioni: 1VD-FTV (4.5L V8 Twin-Turbo Diesel) engine: Garrett GTX4202R turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, upgraded to 1.3 bar boost, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a dual-mode Valvetronic setup by Akrapović for on/off-road sound modulation. Includes a Denso fuel pump upgrade to 300 LPH and 30% larger Bosch injectors for E85 compatibility.

Full Ohlins TTX46 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the J200’s 3,210 kg weight, and reinforced top mounts by SuperPro. Includes a 35mm front sway bar and 28mm rear sway bar from Whiteline, paired with poly bushings for chassis rigidity.

PWR Australia radiator with dual 450W electric fans, a Setrab 50-row oil cooler for the 1VD-FTV, and a custom intercooler setup with a 4.5L core from Bell Intercoolers, reducing intake temps by 30°C under sustained load. ECU reflash via Ecutek RaceROM with launch control, flat-foot shifting, and a custom torque split map for the Torsen LSD.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit for J200 (2015-2021 facelift), featuring carbon fiber fenders with integrated air vents, a custom front splitter with canards, and a rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts. Painted in Toyota ‘Burning Black’ with matte bronze accents.

Rocket Bunny rear wing (Type 2) with adjustable carbon fiber blades, mounted on custom aluminum pedestals for a 15-degree angle. Includes a custom LED taillight setup with sequential turn signals and smoked lenses by Vland.

BBS RF-X II 22-inch forged wheels in matte gold, 9.5J front and 11J rear with 285/35R22 and 325/30R22 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Brake upgrade to AP Racing 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear) with 400mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
